title: Distill knowledge of additive tree models into generalized linear models: a new learning approach for non-smooth generalized additive models
search_query: Distill knowledge of additive tree models into generalized linear models: a new learning approach for non-smooth generalized additive models
notes: Abstract Generalized additive models (GAMs) are a leading model class for interpretable machine learning. GAMs were originally defined with smooth shape functions of the predictor variables and trained using smoothing splines. Recently, tree-based GAMs where shape functions are g...
